subcodes.first_line: O thou who art captivated by the love of that celestial Beloved! Give thanks unto God that thou hast attained unto the luminous sanctuary and to the dust of its threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اسیر محبت آندلبر آسمانی شکر کن خدا را که ببقعه نوراء رسیدی و بتراب عتبه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Shrines and Holy places, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
